text.message: Wanna mae a deal here oj? I can leave you 9 10 2
oj give me nb and ill take it
Tuens out I almost can't block oj lol
I'd have done that one blue
i have to hold road vs orange
I can't buy devs witout rock😅
Its kinda you that should be buying with the pair of 9s
no im playing road but i think its cooked with me 7ing out
yall all going for road it seems lol
eh i think ur winning now
Yeah thats why I offered ns and not nb
Lol oj goes to 8 with road too
Just realized he doesnt have it
yeah but im def not getting road long term here
You dont need long term to win
nah i do cuz u or black can easily extend
Is that a city? He has 3 wood in hand
cuz orange can still take road
yeah maybe not anymore, u bought devs
u all can relax about road here
had to lock road but oj is leading actually
Oj has to pace army then
yup its oj, could flip knight and win next turn guaranteed
should play a knight red if u have
Spend your stuff we're in mono territory now
Blue what do you need to pop? In case oj doesnt have a knight
oj has the win im pretty sure
